  • Package battleship.model

    • Class battleship.model.Cards

      class Cards extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • color
          String color
        • defence
          int defence
        • frontImage
          String frontImage
          Single Variables for Cards object. frontImage is path for the card images. Differently variables are used in constructors according the card type.

          char mdType
        • opened
          boolean opened
        • power
          int power
        • sank
          boolean sank
        • shipType
          char shipType
        • struck
          boolean struck
        • team
          String team
          Single Variables for Cards object. frontImage is path for the card images. Differently variables are used in constructors according the card type.
        • type
          String type
          Single Variables for Cards object. frontImage is path for the card images. Differently variables are used in constructors according the card type.
